variant_name: 沈词 — 提亲时的清冷世家公子
trigger: 沈家第一次上门提亲，在高家正堂与高令宁当众交锋时出现。

appearance_delta.face: 面色冷白，神情比主设定更疏离克制，抬眼看人时压迫感更重，尚未显露明显狼狈或病态
appearance_delta.body: 身形修长端正，站姿极稳，带有刻意维持的世家体面与官场仪态
appearance_delta.hair: 乌发严整束起，玉冠或正式会客冠饰更工整，不见丝毫散乱
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 在众目睽睽下被退木雁仍维持表面平静，唯有眼神骤冷，显出重生后首次正面碰撞的锋利感

costume_override.outfit: 正式提亲场合所穿的考究深色长袍或半礼制服饰，衣料贵重但不过分张扬，保持文臣世家的克制体面

visual_reference: Ancient Chinese noble scholar-official during a formal marriage proposal, tall slender man with pale skin, refined handsome face, cold dark eyes, black hair tied neatly with jade crown, immaculate dark blue-black hanfu with subtle gold detailing, standing in a traditional family hall beside betrothal gifts, restrained aristocratic aura, tense eye contact, cinematic historical drama lighting, elegant composition, high detail
visual_prompt_negative: modern suit, beard, glasses, armor, messy hair, bright smile, casual clothing, fantasy elements, exaggerated jewelry, contemporary interior
emotional_tone: 表面平静、内里森冷，被冒犯后的克制对峙
